entity.label: Shuah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Canaanite whose daughter was married to Judah (1 Chr. 2:3).

nodes.label: Shuah
nodes.description: A Canaanite whose daughter was married to Judah (1 Chr. 2:3).

verses.text: And Judah saw there a daughter of a certain Canaanite, whose name was Shuah; and he took her, and went in unto her.
And in process of time the daughter of Shuah Judah’s wife died; and Judah was comforted, and went up unto his sheepshearers to Timnath, he and his friend Hirah the Adullamite.

The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the LORD; and he slew him.
